Final response excerpt:
Done and shipped (`b6d56f4`). All four traps are fixed in the Dartmouth repo, verified end-to-end, and pushed — so none of them propagate into the template.

## What changed
| Trap | Fix |
|---|---|
| **Dead `SITE` config** | Wired into BaseLayout (name, og, wordmark, footer, description) + `astro.config` (site URL). Rebranding is now **one object**, not a find-replace across 6 files. |
| **Duplicate `tokens.css`** | Deleted the stale root copy — only `public/tokens.css` is served, so editing the root one was a silent no-op. |
| **Wrong fork recipe** | `about.astro` now points forkers at `src/site.config.ts` + the `--color-accent` token in `public/tokens.css`, not the unused `tailwind.config.mjs`. |
| **Broken `sarakay` handle** | All repo/issue links in about/privacy/terms now flow throu…
